caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest, a black and blue baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional studio microphone. He is seated in a recording studio with a white wall behind him featuring gold stars and the text "HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, a dark backdrop displays "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, moving it from a raised position with an open palm toward his side. He maintains a focused expression while speaking, with his head slightly turned toward the microphone. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the equipment and the branded elements of the podcast set.
